scripts.deploy:sbt:dry: node -e "const m=require('./scripts/deploy_contract'); process.env.DEPLOY_DRY_RUN='1'; m.deploy().then((r)=>{console.log('Deploy result', r);}).catch((e)=>{console.error('Deploy failed:', e); process.exit(1);});"
